languages.text: "Ваша наблюдательность достойна похвалы, служитель Бога-на-Троне. Я тоже чувствую, как сторонние силы изменили творение моих темных кузенов".

traits.locale_text: "Ваша наблюдательность достойна похвалы, служитель Бога-на-Троне. Я тоже чувствую, как сторонние силы изменили творение моих темных кузенов".
traits.speaker: RangerEldarCompanion

traits.locale_text: "Ваша наблюдательность достойна похвалы, служитель Бога-на-Троне. Я тоже чувствую, как сторонние силы изменили творение моих темных кузенов".
traits.speaker: RangerEldarCompanion

languages.text: "Your power of observation is commendable, servant of the Throned God. I also feel the otherworldly powers changed the creation of my grim cousins."
languages.original_text: "Ваша наблюдательность достойна похвалы, служитель Бога-на-Троне. Я тоже чувствую, как сторонние силы изменили творение моих темных кузенов".

traits.locale_text: "Your power of observation is commendable, servant of the Throned God. I also feel the otherworldly powers changed the creation of my grim cousins."
traits.speaker: RangerEldarCompanion

traits.locale_text: "Your power of observation is commendable, servant of the Throned God. I also feel the otherworldly powers changed the creation of my grim cousins."
traits.speaker: RangerEldarCompanion

traits.locale_text: "Your power of observation is commendable, servant of the Throned God. I also feel the otherworldly powers changed the creation of my grim cousins."
traits.speaker: RangerEldarCompanion

languages.text: "Deine Beobachtungsgabe ist lobenswert, Diener des thronenden Gottes. Auch ich spüre, dass die jenseitigen Kräfte die Schöpfung meiner grimmigen Cousins verändert haben."
languages.original_text: "Your power of observation is commendable, servant of the Throned God. I also feel the otherworldly powers changed the creation of my grim cousins."

languages.text: "Votre sens de l'observation est louable, serviteur du Dieu Trône. Je sens aussi que les pouvoirs d'un autre monde ont modifié la création de mes sinistres cousins."
languages.original_text: "Your power of observation is commendable, servant of the Throned God. I also feel the otherworldly powers changed the creation of my grim cousins."

languages.text: "你的观察力值得称赞，王座之神的仆人。我也感受到了异世界的力量改变了我那严峻的堂兄弟的创造。"
languages.original_text: "Your power of observation is commendable, servant of the Throned God. I also feel the otherworldly powers changed the creation of my grim cousins."

languages.text: "Tu poder de observación es encomiable, siervo del Dios Tronado. También siento que los poderes de otro mundo cambiaron la creación de mis sombríos primos".
languages.original_text: "Your power of observation is commendable, servant of the Throned God. I also feel the otherworldly powers changed the creation of my grim cousins."

languages.text: "玉座の神のしもべよ、君の観察力は称賛に値する。異世界の力が、私の厳しい従兄弟たちの創造を変えたことも感じている。"
languages.original_text: "Your power of observation is commendable, servant of the Throned God. I also feel the otherworldly powers changed the creation of my grim cousins."

languages.text: "Gözlem gücünüz övgüye değer, Tahttaki Tanrı'nın hizmetkârı. Acımasız kuzenlerimin yaratılışını değiştiren diğer dünya güçlerini de hissediyorum."
languages.original_text: "Your power of observation is commendable, servant of the Throned God. I also feel the otherworldly powers changed the creation of my grim cousins."
